ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (clinician, researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient (M for malignant, B for benign) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at diagnosis */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ehr_data" (
  "ehr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EHR record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the EHR */,
  "ehr_data" TEXT /* The actual EHR data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the EHR data was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ehr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_characteristics" (
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the tumor */,
  "radius_mean" REAL /* Mean radius of the tumor */,
  "texture_mean" REAL /* Mean texture of the tumor */,
  "perimeter_mean" REAL /* Mean perimeter of the tumor */,
  "area_mean" REAL /* Mean area of the tumor */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Image data of the tumor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metrics record */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tumor associated with these metrics */,
  "radius_se" REAL /* Standard error of the radius */,
  "texture_se" REAL /* Standard error of the texture */,
  "perimeter_se" REAL /* Standard error of the perimeter */,
  "area_se" REAL /* Standard error of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_metrics" (
  "advanced_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced metrics record */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tumor associated with these advanced metrics */,
  "radius_worst" REAL /* Worst radius value of the tumor */,
  "texture_worst" REAL /* Worst texture value of the tumor */,
  "perimeter_worst" REAL /* Worst perimeter value of the tumor */,
  "area_worst" REAL /* Worst area value of the tumor */,
  "fractal_dimension" REAL /* Fractal dimension of the tumor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advanced_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the participant is part of */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient participating in the study */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient joined the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)
